aic_heavy_armor.name: AIC Heavy Armor
aic_heavy_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's HP +500 
Set Effect: When the wearer defeats an enemy, restore 100 HP. Effect trigger cooldown: 5s.

aic_light_armor.name: AIC Light Armor
aic_light_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's HP +500 
Set Effect: When the wearer defeats an enemy, ATK +20 for 5s.

armored_msgr_jacket.name: Armored MSGR Jacket
armored_msgr_jacket.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Strength +50 
Set Effect: When the wearer's HP is below 50%, the wearer gains 30% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG.

mordvolt_insulation_vest.name: Mordvolt Insulation Vest
mordvolt_insulation_vest.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Intellect +50 
Set Effect: When the wearer's HP is above 80%, Arts DMG +20%.

mordvolt_resistant_vest.name: Mordvolt Resistant Vest
mordvolt_resistant_vest.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Will +50 
Set Effect: When the wearer's HP is below 50%, Treatment Effect +30%.

roving_msgr_jacket.name: Roving MSGR Jacket
roving_msgr_jacket.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Agility +50 
Set Effect: When the wearer's HP is above 80%, Physical DMG +20%

aburrey_heavy_armor.name: Aburrey Heavy Armor
aburrey_heavy_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Skill DMG +24% 
Set Effect: When the wearer casts a battle skill, combo skill, or ultimate, gain ATK +5% for 15s. The buff from each of the three skill types is unique and does not stack with itself.

aburrey_heavy_armor_t1.name: Aburrey Heavy Armor T1
aburrey_heavy_armor_t1.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Skill DMG +24% 
Set Effect: When the wearer casts a battle skill, combo skill, or ultimate, gain ATK +5% for 15s. The buff from each of the three skill types is unique and does not stack with itself.

aethertech_plating.name: Aethertech Plating
aethertech_plating.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +8% 
Set Effect: After the wearer applies Vulnerability, the wearer gains Physical DMG +8% for 15s. This effect can reach 4 stacks. If the target already has 4 stack(s) of Vulnerability, the wearer gains an additional Physical DMG +16% for 10s. This effect cannot stack.

bonekrusha_heavy_armor.name: Bonekrusha Heavy Armor
bonekrusha_heavy_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +15% 
Set Effect: When the wearer casts a combo skill, gain 1 stack of Bonekrushing Smash that grants the wearer's next battle skill DMG +30%. Bonekrushing Smash can stack 2 time(s).

lynx_cuirass.name: LYNX Cuirass
lynx_cuirass.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's HP Treatment Efficiency +20% 
Set Effect: After the wearer gives HP treatment to an allied target, that target also gains 15% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG for 10s. If the said treatment exceeds the target's Max HP, the target gains 30% DMG Reduction against all types of DMG. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.

lynx_heavy_armor.name: LYNX Heavy Armor
lynx_heavy_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's HP Treatment Efficiency +20%

swordmancer_heavy_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Stagger Efficiency Bonus +20% 
Set Effect: After the wearer applies a Physical Status, the wearer also performs 1 hit that deals 250% ATK of Physical DMG and [10 Stagger]. Effect trigger cooldown: 15s.

Set Effect: After the wearer applies 2 or more stacks of Arts Infliction on the enemy, the wearer gains Arts DMG Dealt +35% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

type_50_yinglung_heavy_armor.name: Type 50 Yinglung Heavy Armor
type_50_yinglung_heavy_armor.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +15% 
Set Effect: When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Yinglung's Edge that gives DMG +20% to the wearer's next combo skill. Yinglung's Edge can stack 3 time(s).

Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +10% 
Set Effect: Whenever the wearer consumes Electrification or Corrosion, the wearer gains a number of buff stacks equal to the Status Level of the Arts Reaction consumed, with each buff stack giving Electric DMG Dealt and Nature DMG Dealt +15% for 25s. Bonus Stat: Wearer's Combo Skill Cooldown Reduction +15%. 
Set Effect: When the wearer casts a combo skill, the wearer gains Skill DMG Dealt +20% (for every skill) for 15s. This effect can reach 2 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

swordmancer_tac_gauntlets.name: Swordmancer TAC Gauntlets
swordmancer_tac_gauntlets.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Stagger Efficiency Bonus +20% 
Set Effect: After the wearer applies a Physical Status, the wearer also performs 1 hit that deals 250% ATK of Physical DMG and [10 Stagger]. Effect trigger cooldown: 15s.

swordmancer_tac_gauntlets_t1.name: Swordmancer TAC Gauntlets T1
swordmancer_tac_gauntlets_t1.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Stagger Efficiency Bonus +20% 
Set Effect: After the wearer applies a Physical Status, the wearer also performs 1 hit that deals 250% ATK of Physical DMG and [10 Stagger]. Effect trigger cooldown: 15s.

swordmancer_tac_gloves.name: Swordmancer TAC Gloves
swordmancer_tac_gloves.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Stagger Efficiency Bonus +20% 
Set Effect: After the wearer applies a Physical Status, the wearer also performs 1 hit that deals 250% ATK of Physical DMG and [10 Stagger]. Effect trigger cooldown: 15s.

tide_surge_gauntlets.name: Tide Surge Gauntlets
tide_surge_gauntlets.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's Skill DMG Dealt +20% 
Set Effect: After the wearer applies 2 or more stacks of Arts Infliction on the enemy, the wearer gains Arts DMG Dealt +35% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

type_50_yinglung_gloves.name: Type 50 Yinglung Gloves
type_50_yinglung_gloves.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +15% 
Set Effect: When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Yinglung's Edge that gives DMG +20% to the wearer's next combo skill. Yinglung's Edge can stack 3 time(s).

type_50_yinglung_gloves_t1.name: Type 50 Yinglung Gloves T1
type_50_yinglung_gloves_t1.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +15% 
Set Effect: When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Yinglung's Edge that gives DMG +20% to the wearer's next combo skill. Yinglung's Edge can stack 3 time(s).

xiranflow_gloves.name: Xiranflow Gloves
stats: Cryo and Electric DMG Dealt Bonus: 19.20%
xiranflow_gloves.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +10% 
Set Effect: Whenever the wearer consumes Electrification or Corrosion, the wearer gains a number of buff stacks equal to the Status Level of the Arts Reaction consumed, with each buff stack giving Electric DMG Dealt and Nature DMG Dealt +15% for 25s. The number of buff stacks maxes out at 3 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

type_50_yinglung_radar.name: Type 50 Yinglung Radar
type_50_yinglung_radar.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +15% 
Set Effect: When any operator in the team casts a battle skill, the wearer gains 1 stack of Yinglung's Edge that gives DMG +20% to the wearer's next combo skill. Yinglung's Edge can stack 3 time(s).

xiranflow_baton.name: Xiranflow Baton
xiranflow_baton.set_effect_text:
Bonus Stat: Wearer's ATK +10% 
Set Effect: Whenever the wearer consumes Electrification or Corrosion, the wearer gains a number of buff stacks equal to the Status Level of the Arts Reaction consumed, with each buff stack giving Electric DMG Dealt and Nature DMG Dealt +15% for 25s. The number of buff stacks maxes out at 3 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.
